RUHS BH Inpatient Provider Manual | Riverside University Health System

RUHS BH Inpatient Provider Manual
Welcome to the Riverside University Health System – Behavioral Health Plan provider network. The Behavioral Health Plan authorizes inpatient services through the Quality Improvement Inpatient Program for Riverside County Medi-Cal beneficiaries and for indigent Riverside County residents.
The Riverside University Health System – Behavioral Health Inpatient Provider Manual
was developed as a reference for participating providers and contains guidelines to assist you in meeting the standards for the provision of psychiatric inpatient hospital services for our consumers. Please review the manual and maintain it as a reference for future use. We look forward to working with you to provide quality, cost effective inpatient services to our consumers. If you have any questions, please call Quality Improvement Inpatient Program at (951) 358-6031.
